hook_en: Reveals the shocking truth about the environmental impact of animal agriculture. See why your land and water bars overflowed.
hook_zh: 揭示畜牧業對環境的驚人影響。睇下點解你嘅水資源同土地資源會用晒。

hook_en: Exposes the dark side of the fishing industry. Curious about the true cost of that seafood?
hook_zh: 揭露漁業的黑暗面。食海鮮嘅的真正代價係咩？

hook_en: Think you need meat for protein? Watch how plant-based diets actually enhance peak athletic performance.
hook_zh: Build 肌要食肉？睇下植物性飲食點樣提升頂尖運動員嘅表現。

hook_en: Uncover the secret to preventing and even reversing chronic diseases. Hint: It's heavily tied to saturated fats.
hook_zh: 揭開預防甚至逆轉慢性病嘅秘密。原來同飽和脂肪有關？

title_zh: Forks Over Knives (刀叉下的秘密)
hook_en: Discover how a whole-food, plant-based diet can save your life and the planet.
hook_zh: 一齊睇下「整全植物性飲食」(WFPB)點樣拯救我哋嘅生命同地球。

hook_en: Chickens are more than just a meal. This film reveals the individuality and sentience of the world's most exploited land animal.
hook_zh: 呢部短片話我哋知：世界上被剝削得最嚴重的陸上動物，每隻都係有自己個性嘅獨立個體。
